title: Huawei AP361 - WiFi6 indoor Dual Band AP, smart antenna
description: WiFi access point HUAWEI ensures immediate access to the Internet for all individual devices thanks to MU-MIMO technology. It works in two frequency bands, which ensures ideal flexibility and performance for a typical home network. With a WiFi transfer speed of 2975 Mb/s , you can count on your connection to be fast enough. The AP has WiFi 6 technology. This device is capable of working on the 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz frequency bands. Data transfer security is achieved through WPA2, WPA2-PSK,… Dual-band radio that boasts 2x2 MU-MIMO & OFDMA (5GHz) and 2x2 MIMO (2.4GHz) Wi-Fi 6 technology 5GHz throughput up to 2400 Mbps 2.4GHz throughput up to 575 Mbps 802.3af POE power supply WPA3 security Max. number of users 128, recommended 80 AP supports cloud management . It provides various authentication functions such as PSK, portal, SMS and social authentication without the need to use WAC or authentication server. This greatly simplifies network work and reduces infrastructure investment. In addition, the AP access point can be deployed on a cloud-based management platform to realize cloud-based network planning, deployment, control, operation and maintenance. In cases of multi-site deployment, after pre-configuration in the… Device Holder Screws, wall plugs
specsSearch: Wireless features Frequency range [MHz] 2412 - 2472, 5180 - 5825 Wireless frequency 2.4 + 5 GHz (dual band) WiFi standards 802.11ax, 802.11ac, 802.11ac - wave2, 802.11n, 802.11a, 802.11b/g MU-MIMO Yes Transmission speed - 5GHz [Mb/s] 1201 Transmission speed - 2.4GHz [Mb/s] 574 Tx power 2.4GHz [dBm] 20 Tx power 5GHz [dBm] 20 Security WEP, WPA, WPA2, WPA3 2.4GHz MIMO 2 x 2 5GHz MIMO 2 x 2 Type of antenna Built-in Internal antennas 4 Antenna gain [dBi] 4, 5 Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (1) 10/100/1000Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes Power Power over Ethernet 802.3af PoE type PoE-In (only) Max. power consumption [W] 8,8 Physical characteristics Purpose Indoor Operating temperature [°C] 10 up to 50 Weight [g] 450 Width [mm] 180 Height [mm] 35 Depth [mm] 180 Hardware CPU Dual Core CPU frequency [MHz] 1000 RAM [MB] 512 Software Operating mode Access Point
